title: Lab 03: DNF Repository Configuration
description: Configure offline BaseOS and AppStream repositories on both systems.

tasks.title: Client Repositories
tasks.prompt:
On clientvm, configure a persistent repository file with the following settings:

BaseOS: http://servervm/repo/BaseOS/
AppStream: http://servervm/repo/AppStream/
gpgcheck: disabled
Repositories: enabled

tasks.title: Server Repositories
tasks.prompt: On servervm, configure the same repository file with the same settings.

tasks.title: Verify Repositories
tasks.prompt: Verify that both repositories are available on both systems.

hints: You can use one repo file per system.
Use vim to type the repository file manually.

checks.original_command: dnf repolist | grep -Eq 'rhcsa-baseos|BaseOS' && dnf repolist | grep -Eq 'rhcsa-appstream|AppStream'
checks.command: dnf repolist | grep -Eq 'rhcsa-baseos|BaseOS' && dnf repolist | grep -Eq 'rhcsa-appstream|AppStream'

checks.original_command: ssh admin@servervm sudo dnf repolist | grep -Eq 'rhcsa-baseos|BaseOS' && ssh admin@servervm sudo dnf repolist | grep -Eq 'rhcsa-appstream|AppStream'
checks.command: dnf repolist | grep -Eq 'rhcsa-baseos|BaseOS' && ssh admin@servervm sudo dnf repolist | grep -Eq 'rhcsa-appstream|AppStream'
